name: A Cat of Ill Omen
description: FLIP: Choose 1 Trap from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck, or, if "Necrovalley" is on the field, you can add that Trap to your hand instead.

name: A Man with Wdjat
description: When you Normal Summon this card, and during each of your Standby Phases: Select 1 Set card on your opponent's side of the field; look at it, then return it to its original position.

name: Achacha Archer
description: When this card is Normal or Flip Summoned: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Alligator's Sword
description: Ey, dis mighty lissard man can swing his sword so fast, dat it's more dan da speed a sound!

name: Alligator's Sword Dragon
description:
"Baby Dragon" + "Alligator's Sword"
This card can attack your opponent directly if the only face-up monsters they control are EARTH, WATER, or FIRE.

name: Amazoness Chain Master
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can pay 1500 LP; look at your opponent's hand, then add 1 monster from their hand to your hand.

name: Amazoness Swords Woman
description: Your opponent takes any battle damage you would have taken from battles involving this card instead.

name: Amulet Dragon
description:
"Dark Magician" + 1 Dragon monster
Must be Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials or with "The Eye of Timaeus". If this card is Special Summoned: Target any number of Spells in any GY(s) (min. 1); banish those targets, and if you do, this card gains 100 ATK for each card banished by this effect. If this card is destroyed: You can target 1 Spellcaster monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

name: Apprentice Magician
description: If this card is Summoned: Target 1 face-up card on the field that you can place a Spell Counter on; place 1 Spell Counter on that target. If this card is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower Spellcaster monster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position.

name: Arcane Barrier
description: Each time a face-up Spellcaster monster(s) on the field is destroyed, place 1 Spell Counter on this card (max. 4). You can send this card and 1 face-up Spellcaster monster you control to the GY; draw 1 card for each Spell Counter that was on this card.

name: Armed Ninja
description: FLIP: Target 1 Spell Card on the field; destroy that target. (If the target is Set, reveal it, and destroy it if it is a Spell Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position.)

name: Axe Dragonute
description: If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Baby Dragon
description: Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

name: Backfire
description: When a FIRE monster(s) you control is destroyed and sent to the GY: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Bait Doll
description: Target 1 Set card in the Spell & Trap Card Zone; reveal that target, force its activation if it is a Trap Card, then negate its effect if the activation timing is incorrect, and if you do, destroy it. (If it is not a Trap Card, return it face-down.) When this card resolves, shuffle it into the Deck instead of sending it to the Graveyard.

name: Banner of Courage
description: All monsters you control gain 200 ATK during your Battle Phase only.

name: Begone, Knave!
description: When a monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Return that monster to the hand.

name: Big Shield Gardna
description: When a Spell Card is activated that targets this face-down card (and no other cards) (Quick Effect): Change this card to face-up Defense Position, and if you do, negate the activation. If this card is attacked, change it to Attack Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Black Brachios
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; change that target to face-up Defense Position.

name: Black Dragon Collapserpent
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT monster from your Graveyard. You can only Special Summon "Black Dragon Collapserpent" once per turn this way. If this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can add 1 "White Dragon Wyverburster" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Black Luster Ritual
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Black Luster Soldier". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: Black Luster Soldier
description: A soldier who underwent a special ritual. This warrior is the master of both light and darkness.

name: Black Stego
description: If this face-up Attack Position card is targeted for an attack: Change this card to Defense Position.

name: Black Veloci
description: If this card attacks an opponent's monster, it gains 400 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this card is attacked by an opponent's monster, it loses 400 DEF during the Damage Step only.

name: Blade Knight
description: While you have 1 or less cards in your hand, this card gains 400 ATK. If you control no other monsters, negate the effects of Flip Monsters destroyed by battle with this card.

name: Blast Magician
description: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell Card resolves. You can remove any number of Spell Counters from this card, then target 1 face-up monster on the field with ATK less than or equal to the number of counters you removed x 700; destroy that target.

name: Block Attack
description: Target 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls; change that target to face-up Defense Position.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
description: "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon"

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Book of Lunar Eclipse
description: Discard 1 card, then target 2 face-up monsters on the field; change them to face-down Defense Position.

name: Book of Secret Arts
description: Increase the ATK and DEF of a Spellcaster-Type monster equipped with this card by 300 points.

name: Bowganian
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Inflict 600 damage to your opponent.

name: Breaker the Magical Warrior
description: If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 1 Spell Counter on it (max. 1). Gains 300 ATK for each Spell Counter on it. You can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

name: Bright Star Dragon
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 other face-up monster on the field; increase that target's Level by 2 until the end of this turn.

name: Burst Rebirth
description: Pay 2000 LP, then target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in face-down Defense Position.

name: Buster Blader
description: Gains 500 ATK for each Dragon monster your opponent controls or is in their GY.

name: Butterspy Protection
description: Target 1 face-up Attack Position monster on the field; change it to face-up Defense Position, also any damage you take for the rest of this turn is halved.

name: Call of the Haunted
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Attack Position. When this card leaves the field, destroy that monster. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Chaos Command Magician
description: Negate any monster effects that target this 1 card.

name: Coffin Seller
description: Each time a monster(s) is sent to your opponent's GY: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent.

name: Command Knight
description: All Warrior monsters you control gain 400 ATK. If you control another monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot target this card for attacks.

name: Compulsory Evacuation Device
description: Target 1 monster on the field; return that target to the hand.

name: Comrade Swordsman of Landstar
description: Warrior monsters you control gain 400 ATK.

name: Copy Knight

name: Covering Fire
description: During the Damage Step, if a monster you control attacks or is attacked: Target 1 other face-up monster you control; your battling monster gains ATK equal to the target's ATK, until the end of the Damage Step.

name: Crimson Ninja
description: FLIP: Target 1 Trap Card on the field; destroy that target. (If the target is Set, reveal it, and destroy it if it is a Trap Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position.)

name: Crystal Seer
description: FLIP: Excavate the top 2 cards of your Deck, then add 1 of them to your hand, then place the other on the bottom of your Deck.

name: Curse of the Masked Beast
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "The Masked Beast". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: DMZ Dragon
description: Once per turn: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster in your GY and 1 Dragon monster you control; equip that monster in your GY to that monster on the field as an Equip Spell that makes it gain 500 ATK. At the end of the Damage Step, if your monster equipped with an Equip Card attacked: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy as many cards as possible equipped to that monster you control, and if you do, that monster can make a second attack in a row.

name: Damage Mage
description: When you take damage from a card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain LP equal to the damage you took.

name: Dark Blade
description: They say he is a dragon-manipulating warrior from the dark world. His attack is tremendous, using his two wicked swords.

name: Dark Driceratops
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.

name: Dark Elf
description: This card cannot attack unless you pay 1000 LP.

name: Dark Eruption
description: Target 1 DARK monster with 1500 or less ATK in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Dark Factory of Mass Production
description: Target 2 Normal Monsters in your GY; add them to your hand.

name: Dark Horizon
description: When you take battle or effect damage: Special Summon 1 DARK Spellcaster monster from your Deck with ATK less than or equal to the damage you took.

name: Dark Jeroid
description: When this card is Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 800 ATK.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

description: Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in the GYs.

name: Dark Magician the Dragon Knight
description:
"Dark Magician" + 1 Dragon monster
This card's name becomes "Dark Magician" while on the field or in the GY. Your opponent cannot target Spells/Traps you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

name: Dark Mimic LV1
description: FLIP: Draw 1 card. During your Standby Phase: You can send this face-up card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dark Mimic LV3" from your hand or Deck.

name: Dark Mimic LV3
description: If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Draw 1 card, but if this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Dark Mimic LV1", draw 2 cards instead.

name: Dark Spell Regeneration
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 Spell in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field.

name: Dash Warrior
description: During the Damage Step of your turn, if this card attacks: You can make its ATK become 2400 until the end of the Damage Step. This effect can only be used once.

name: De-Spell
description: Target 1 face-up Spell, or 1 Set Spell/Trap, on the field; destroy that target if it is a Spell. (If the target is Set, reveal it.)

name: Defender, the Magical Knight
description: If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 1 Spell Counter on it (max. 1). Once per turn, if a face-up Spellcaster monster(s) on the field would be destroyed, you can remove 1 Spell Counter from your field for each of those monsters instead.

name: Defense Draw
description: During damage calculation, if you would take battle damage from an opponent's attack: Make the battle damage you take from this battle 0, and if you do, draw 1 card.

name: Destroyersaurus
description: You can discard this card to the GY; add 1 "Jurassic World" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Destruct Potion
description: Select 1 monster you control. Destroy it, and gain LP equal to its ATK.

name: Different Dimension Dragon

name: Dimension Wall
description: Activate only when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Instead of you, your opponent takes the Battle Damage you would have taken from this battle.

name: Dodger Dragon

name: Double Spell
description: Discard 1 Spell Card, then target 1 Spell Card in your opponent's Graveyard; place that target in the appropriate Zone on your side of the field, and as this card's effect resolution, follow its card text as if you had used it yourself.

name: Dragon Treasure
description: A Dragon monster equipped with this card gains 300 ATK/DEF.

name: Dragon's Mirror
description: Fusion Summon 1 Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from your field or GY.

name: Dragon's Rebirth
description: Target 1 Dragon monster you control; banish that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your hand or GY.

name: Drillago

name: Dust Tornado

name: E - Emergency Call

name: Electromagnetic Turtle
description: During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; end the Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Electromagnetic Turtle" once per Duel.

name: Element Dragon
description:
This monster gets the following effect(s) while there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field:
● FIRE: This card gains 500 ATK.
● WIND: If this card destroyed your opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.

name: Element Saurus
description:
This monster gets the following effect(s) while there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field:
● FIRE: Increase this card's ATK by 500 points.
● EARTH: Negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by this card.

name: Elemental HERO Avian
description: A winged Elemental HERO who wheels through the sky and manipulates the wind. His signature move, Featherbreak, gives villainy a blow from sky-high.

name: Elemental HERO Bladedge
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.

name: Elemental HERO Blazeman
description: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters, also send 1 "Elemental HERO" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Elemental HERO Blazeman", and if you do, this card's Attribute and ATK/DEF become the same as the monster sent to the GY, until the end of this turn. You can only use 1 "Elemental HERO Blazeman" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

name: Elemental HERO Bubbleman
description: If this is the only card in your hand, you can Special Summon it (from your hand). When this card is Summoned: You can draw 2 cards. You must control no other cards and have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Elemental HERO Burstinatrix
description: A flame manipulator who is the only woman among the Elemental HEROes. Her Burstfire burns away villainy.

name: Elemental HERO Captain Gold
description: You can discard this card to the GY; add 1 "Skyscraper" from your Deck to your hand. If "Skyscraper" is not face-up on the field, destroy this card.

name: Elemental HERO Clayman
description: An Elemental HERO with a clay body built-to-last. He'll preserve his Elemental HERO colleagues at any cost.

name: Elemental HERO Darkbright
description:
"Elemental HERO Sparkman" + "Elemental HERO Necroshade"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card attacks, change it to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step. If this card is destroyed: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.

name: Elemental HERO Electrum
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. While face-up on the field, this card is also WIND, WATER, FIRE, and EARTH-Attribute. When this card is Fusion Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck(s). Gains 300 ATK for each monster your opponent controls with the same Attribute as this card.

name: Elemental HERO Escuridao
description:
1 "Elemental HERO" monster + 1 DARK monster
Must be Fusion Summoned. Gains 100 ATK for each "Elemental HERO" monster in your GY.

name: Elemental HERO Flame Wingman
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix"
Must be Fusion Summoned. When this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK.

name: Elemental HERO Heat
description: This card gains 200 ATK for each "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Elemental HERO Ice Edge
description: When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; destroy that target. Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can discard 1 card; this card can attack your opponent directly this turn.

name: Elemental HERO Inferno
description:
"Elemental HERO Heat" + "Elemental HERO Lady Heat"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card battles a WATER monster, this card gains 1000 ATK during the Damage Step only.

name: Elemental HERO Lady Heat
description: During each of your End Phases: Inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Elemental HERO Mariner
description:
"Elemental HERO Bubbleman" + "Elemental HERO Avian"
Must be Fusion Summoned. While you have any face-down card(s) in your Spell & Trap Zones, this card can attack your opponent directly.

name: Elemental HERO Mudballman
description:
"Elemental HERO Bubbleman" + "Elemental HERO Clayman"
Must be Fusion Summoned.

name: Elemental HERO Necroid Shaman
description:
"Elemental HERO Wildheart" + "Elemental HERO Necroshade"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy that target, then Special Summon 1 monster from your opponent's GY to their field.

name: Elemental HERO Necroshade
description: Once, while this card is in the GY, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Elemental HERO" monster without Tributing.

name: Elemental HERO Neos
description: A new Elemental HERO has arrived from Neo-Space! When he initiates a Contact Fusion with a Neo-Spacian his unknown powers are unleashed.

name: Elemental HERO Neos Alius
description:
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. While this card is a Normal Monster on the field, you can Normal Summon it to have it become an Effect Monster with this effect:
● This card's name becomes "Elemental HERO Neos" while on the field.

name: Elemental HERO Ocean
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "HERO" monster you control or in your GY; return that target to the hand.

name: Elemental HERO Prisma
description: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, then send 1 of the Fusion Materials listed on that card from your Main Deck to the GY; this card's name becomes the sent monster's name until the End Phase.

name: Elemental HERO Rampart Blaster
description:
"Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix"
Must be Fusion Summoned. This card can attack directly while in Defense Position. If it does, apply its ATK for damage calculation, and its ATK is halved during damage calculation only.

name: Elemental HERO Sparkman
description: An Elemental HERO and a warrior of light who proficiently wields many kinds of armaments. His Static Shockwave cuts off the path of villainy.

name: Elemental HERO Steam Healer
description:
"Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Gain LP equal to the original ATK of that destroyed monster in the GY.

name: Elemental HERO Tempest
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Sparkman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. You can send 1 other card you control to the GY, then target 1 monster you control; while this card is face-up on the field, that monster cannot be destroyed by battle.

name: Elemental HERO Voltic
description: When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 of your banished "Elemental HERO" monsters; Special Summon that target.

name: Elemental HERO Wildheart
description: Unaffected by Trap effects.

name: Elemental HERO Woodsman
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

name: Elemental Recharge
description: Gain 1000 LP for each face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Emblem of Dragon Destroyer
description: Add 1 "Buster Blader" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

name: Final Attack Orders

name: Flamvell Guard

name: Fortress Warrior

name: Full-Force Strike

name: Fusion Recovery
description: Target 1 "Polymerization", and 1 Fusion Material Monster that was used for a Fusion Summon, in your Graveyard; add them to your hand.

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
description: A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.

name: Gearfried the Iron Knight
description: If either player equips an Equip Card to this card: Destroy that Equip Card.

name: Giant Germ
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then you can Special Summon any number of "Giant Germs" from your Deck in face-up Attack Position.

name: Giant Rat
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.

name: Giant Rex

name: Gil Garth
description: This giant steel-clad soldier is a terror to behold. He wields his massive blade with brutal efficiency.

name: Gilasaurus
description: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If Summoned this way: Activate this effect; your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster from their GY.

name: Gilford the Legend

name: Goblin Attack Force
description: If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and its battle position cannot be changed until the End Phase of your next turn.

name: Gold Sarcophagus
description: Banish 1 card from your Deck, face-up. During your second Standby Phase after this card's activation, add that card to your hand.

name: Golem Dragon
description: Your opponent cannot target face-up Dragon-Type monsters for attacks, except this one.

name: Hero Counterattack
description: When an "Elemental HERO" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Your opponent chooses and reveals 1 random card from your hand, then, if it is an "Elemental HERO" monster, you destroy 1 monster your opponent controls and Special Summon the chosen monster.

name: Hero Ring
description: Target 1 Warrior monster on the field with 1500 or less ATK; equip this card to that target. Monsters your opponent controls with 1900 or more ATK cannot attack the equipped monster.

name: Hero Signal
description: When a monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Elemental HERO" monster from your hand or Deck.

name: Holding Arms

While that face-up monster is on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.

name: Humanoid Slime
description: This slime apparently has some human genes in its genetic makeup.

name: Hyper Hammerhead
description: At the end of the Damage Step, if an opponent's monster that battled this card is not destroyed: Return that opponent's monster to the hand.

name: Interdimensional Matter Transporter
description: Target 1 face-up monster you control; banish that target until the End Phase.

name: Jam Breeding Machine

name: Junk Barrage

name: Jurassic World
description: All Dinosaur-Type monsters gain 300 ATK and DEF.

name: Kaiser Sea Horse
description: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a LIGHT monster.

name: Kunai with Chain
description:
Activate 1 or both of these effects (simultaneously).
● When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; change that target to Defense Position.
● Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip this card to that target. It gains 500 ATK.

name: Lava Golem
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) to your opponent's side of the field by Tributing 2 monsters they control. You cannot Normal Summon/Set the turn you Special Summon this card. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.

name: Legendary Fiend
description: During each of your Standby Phases: This card gains 700 ATK.

name: Lightning Blade
description: Equip only to a Warrior monster. It gains 800 ATK. All WATER monsters on the field lose 500 ATK.

name: Little-Winguard

name: Luster Dragon
description: A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.

name: Magic Cylinder
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.

name: Magic Formula
description: Equip only to "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl". It gains 700 ATK. When this card is sent from the field to the GY: Gain 1000 LP.

name: Magic Jammer
description: When a Spell Card is activated: Discard 1 card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Magic Planter
description: Send 1 face-up Continuous Trap you control to the GY; draw 2 cards.

name: Magical Dimension
description: If you control a Spellcaster monster: Target 1 monster you control; Tribute that target, then Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand, then you can destroy 1 monster on the field.

name: Magical Stone Excavation
description: Discard 2 cards, then target 1 Spell in your GY; add it to your hand.

name: Magical Undertaker
description: FLIP: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Spellcaster monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

name: Magician of Faith
description: FLIP: Target 1 Spell in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Magician's Circle
description: When a Spellcaster monster declares an attack: Each player Special Summons 1 Spellcaster monster with 2000 or less ATK from their Deck in Attack Position.

name: Magician's Valkyria
description: Your opponent cannot select another Spellcaster monster on the field as an attack target.

name: Marauding Captain
description: Your opponent cannot target face-up Warrior monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your hand.

name: Mask of Darkness
description: FLIP: Target 1 Trap in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Mask of Dispel
description: Select 1 face-up Spell Card on the field. The controller of the Spell Card takes 500 points of damage during each of your Standby Phases. When the selected card is removed from the field, destroy this card.

name: Mask of Weakness
description: Target 1 attacking monster; that target loses 700 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: Masked Dragon
